scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter ./packages/common... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/app... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/platform-center... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/ui-kit... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/product-lingji... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/product-tiangong... build
scripts.build:app-builder: pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:plugins && pnpm --filter ./apps/app-builder... devops_build
scripts.build:mobile-editor: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter ./packages/ui-kit-mobile... build && pnpm --filter ./apps/mobile-editor... devops_build
scripts.build:runtime: pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:plugins && pnpm --filter ./apps/runtime... devops_build
scripts.build:mobile-runtime: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter ./packages/ui-kit-mobile... build && pnpm --filter ./apps/mobile-runtime... devops_build
